## 📝 PR Description / 变更描述
A summary of the changes in this Pull Request.
简要描述此 PR 所做的更改与主要功能。

## 🧪 Testing Checklist / 测试清单
- [ ] Added unit tests under `tests/` for new functionality / 已添加单元测试
- [ ] Fast test suite passed: `pytest tests/` / 已通过快速测试套件
- [ ] Stress test suite passed: `pytest tests_stress/` / 已通过压力测试套件
- [ ] Static type check passed: `mypy --strict python/pysync/__init__.pyi` / 已通过 Mypy 类型校验
- [ ] Code compiles with 0 warnings: `maturin develop` / 编译无警告
